snippet.title: Thodi Der -Full Video | Half Girlfriend | Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor | Farhan S & Shreya Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Presenting the full video song of Thodi Der sung by Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal.

Song - Thodi Der
Movie - Half Girlfriend
Singers - Farhan Saeed & Shreya Ghoshal
Music - Farhan Saeed
Lyricist - Kumaar

Music Arranged And Programmed By Dj Phukan
Asst. Madhab Deka
Co-Arranged & Keyboards By Ali Mustafa
Acoustic And Electric Guitar By Ankur Mukherjee
Harmonium By Aditya Oke
Sarangi By Murad Ali Khan

Vocals Recorded At Phatbox, (Mumbai)
Recording Engineer's - Pankaj Borah & Bhaskar Sarma
Song Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai (Future Sound Of Bombay)
Asst Mixing Engineers Michael Edwin Pillai & Lucky

Cast - Arjun Kapoor & Shraddha Kapoor
Production House - Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer - Shobha Kapoor, Ekta Kapoor, Mohit Suri & Chetan Bhagat
Director - Mohit Suri

snippet.title: Awarapan 2 Official Teaser | Emraan Hashmi | Disha Patani | Shabana Azmi | Vishesh Bhatt | 14th Aug
snippet.description:
19 years later, Shivam is back. A man haunted by grief and loss, searching for a purpose for his life. Watch the teaser now. 
"Is baar yeh awarapan khatam hoga, ya main." 
 
VISHESH FILMS & MUKESH BHATT Present 
A VISHESH BHATT Production

AWARAPAN 2 

Produced By VISHESH BHATT 
Directed By NITIN KAKKAR
 
Music on SONY MUSIC  
Theatrical Distribution PEN MARUDHAR 
In Cinemas Worldwide - 14 August 2026

snippet.title: BardiyaKo Bagh [Child Version]- Kamal BC Maldai & Aakriti Rai - Mariya Gurung - New Nepali Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kamal BC Maldai Presents:-
BardiyaKo Bagh

--------------------------------------
#BardiyaKoBagh #kamalbcmaldai #KataKata #KamalBC #NepaliSong #NepaliMusic #LokDohori #TrendingNepaliSong #chldversion #aakritirai #bhojpurenani #bhojpureraini

🎶 Audio Credits:- 

♬ Song:- 
Bardiya Ko Bagh

♬ Vocal:-
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai

♬ Lyrics/ Music :- 
Kamal BC Maldai

♬ Music Arranger :- 
Bishwas Nepal

♬ Mix/Mastering :- 
Shyam Swet Rasaili

♬ Studio :- 
Prisma Recording Studio KTM

♬ Audio | Video:- 
Kamal BC Maldai
+977-9851240302
----------------------------------------------

🎬️ Video Credits:- 

🎬 Cast :- 
Kamal BC Maldai
Aakriti Rai
Mariya Gurung

🎬 Director | Cinematographer:- 
Prakash Khadka & Team

🎬 Editor | Colorist:- 
Manoj Karki

🎬 MUA:- 
Sangita Chand Thakuri

BLESSED
MAN BAHADUR BUDHA (FATHER) 
TOPKALA BUDHA  (MOTHER)

SPECIAL THANKS :-
Bijay Rai
Chitra Bahadur Gurung
Manju Gurung
Anjana Gurung
Suk Bahadur Gurung
Amita Gurung
Sanju Gurung
Anju Gurung


--------------------------------------------

Lyrics :-

बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 
बियरको सिसि आयो कमल बिसि 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

घर त मेरो यहाँ हैन बाँके बर्दिया 
तिम्रो रुपले ए कान्छि दिलै चोर्दिया

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

माईला दाई हजुर, केछ केटा हो हल्लिचल्ली
ठिक छ दाई, दामी दामी दामी 
कता हो हामी ?

बर्दियामा हो दाई कता जानू खै 
पाँच बर्ष लभ परेको गर्लफ्रेन्ड पोइल गै 
हाहाहा ... हाहाहा..
मान्छे बौलाएसी कस्को के लाग्छ र खै 

भेट्न आउछु भन्थी मलाई कोहलपुरको चोकमा 
एक कार्टुन रक्सी खाएँ मैले रिसको झोकमा 

बर्दियाको बाघ आयो, बर्दियाको बाघ 
अरु सबै फुच्चेहरु साईड लाग 

कता कता - यता यता 
कता कता - यता यता 

तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म 
तिम्रै सौराई लाग्यापछी तिमलाई भेट्न मन लाग्यो झ्याम्म झ्याम्म

Beerko CC aayo kamal bc
Beerko CC aayo kamal bc

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Gharta mero yaha hoina banke Bardiya 
Timro ruple e kanxi dilai chordiya

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Maila dai hajur kexa keTa ho hallichalli
Thik xa dai dami dami dami 
Kata ho hami 
Bardiyama ho dai kata janu khai

5 Barsa love pareko girlfriend poila gai
Haha haha haha 
Manxe baulayasi kasko k lagxa ra khai

Vetna aauxu vanthi malai Kohalpurko chok ma
1 kartun raksi khaya maile risko jhokma

Bardiyako bagh aayo Bardiyako bagh
Aru sabai fuchcheharu side laag

Kata kata- yata yata 
Kata kata - yata yata 

Timrai saurai lagyapaxi timlai vetna man lagyo jhyamma jhyamma


© Kamal BC Maldai, 2026
All Rights Reserved

snippet.title: Mirzapur The Movie | Official Hindi Teaser | Pankaj Tripathi | Ali Fazal | Divyenndu | 4th Sept
snippet.description:

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: SAATO RE BAHINIYA I सातो रे बहिनिया I OFFICIAL TRAILER I YAMINI SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#yaminisingh #ladomadhesiya #saatorebahiniya #trailer #trending #bhojpurimovie 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH GEETA TIWARI PRODUCTION & MADHU MANJUL ARTS

फ़िल्म – सातो रे बहिनिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार - यामिनी सिंह  ऋतू  चौहान , सृष्टि  पाठक , नम्रता  सिंह  माया  मौर्या  सोनाली  मिश्रा  , पारुल  प्रिया , रूपा  सिंह  , लाडो  मधेसिया  भूपेंद्र  सिंह  , प्रेम  दुबे  , पुष्पेंद्र  राय , स्वीटी  सिंह  , उमाकांत  राय  अशोक गुप्ता, पार्थ  मिश्रा  
बाल कलाकार  – चाहत  राज & यश
निर्देशक – कुणाल  तिवारी  
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक - सत्येंद्र सिंह
संगीतकार-  साजन मिश्रा
गीतकार - प्यारे लाल यादव
संकलन - प्रीतम नायक
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - लोटस स्टूडियो
छायांकन- नागेंद्र कुमार
कोरियोग्राफर – सुदामा मिंज
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – राजा शर्मा
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, धीरेन्द्र कुमार झा व कुणाल तिवारी
म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी

B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  

प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , , हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी ,


FILM- SAATO RE BAHINIYA  (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- YAMINI SINGH ,RITU CHAUHAN, SHRISHTI PATHAK, NAMRATA SINGH MAYA MAURYA ,SONALI MISHRA , PARUL PRIYA , ROOPA SINGH , LADO MADHESIYA ,BHUPENDRA SINGH , PREM DUBEY , PUSHPENDRA RAI, SWEETY SINGH , UMAKANT RAI,ASHOK GUPTA, PARTH MISHRA 
CHILD ARTIST – CHAHAT RAAJ & YASH
DIRECTOR- KUNAL TIWARI 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER – SATYENDRA SINGH 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- SAJAN MISHRA 
LYRICS –PYARE LAL YADAV 
CHIEF ASSISTANT DIRECTOR – PARTH MISHRA
EDITOR-PREETAM NAYAK   
CINEMATOGRAPHER- NAGENDRA KUMAR   
CHOREOGRAPHER- SUDAMA MINJ 
ART DIRECTOR- RAJA SHARMA 
POST PRODUCTION – LOTUS STUDIO
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, DHEERENDRA KUMAR JHA , KUNAL TIWARI 
Music – IVY MUSIC 
Satellite and Digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI


B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV ,NISHI RAI


B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , RAJVI SHIRODARIYA , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE MORE

OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA


IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY, 


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, SHAILESH TRIVEDI 


Subscribe us - https://www.youtube.com/@b4ubhojpuri-
Follow us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/

snippet.title: Welcome To The Jungle - Official Trailer | In Cinemas Now
snippet.description:
Film? Bilkul Fake! Danger? Ekdum Real! Survival Skills? Zero!

Tension out, jungle madness in! Welcome To The Jungle where the mission is unpredictable, the madness is nonstop, and the chaos has a wild side!

#WelcomeToTheJungle, in cinemas now 🍿
Book your tickets: https://linktr.ee/WelcomeToTheJungleTickets 

#WelcomeToTheJungleTrailer 

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali 

A.A. Nadiadwala, Cape of Good Films & Star Studio18 presents

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

🎧 Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

🎬 Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:
Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Everytime every minute of the day
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Rabb yaar gale le saar meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Tu jeet meri jag haar meri
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki

Tumhi ho bandhu

Sakha tumhi

Sakha tumhi

snippet.title: Ghar kaha Paryo - Swoopna Suman Ft. Nikhita ( Official MV)
snippet.description:
#mayalukosamjhana #nepalifolk #naamkpoparyo

We had a great time creating this song and Music Video. Ayush Shrestha, from our band The Asters is missing in this video because of his prior commitments. we really missed him and hopefully he will be there in our next video.

Lyrics : Tanka (Radha Kumari) Poudel  , Swoopna Suman
Composition : Swoopna Suman
Vocals : Swoopna Suman , Nikhita Thapa
Produced/Mixed/Mastered by : Saswot Shrestha
 Flute : Rubin Kumar Shrestha
Guitar : Bishal Chhetri
Sarangi : Manish Gandarva
Mandolin : Saswot Shrestha
Recorded at : Omniphonics Studio ( Balaju)

Starring : Anushree 
                 Swoopna Suman And the Asters
                 Guitar : Ashim Tamang
                 Drums : Saroj Ghimire
                 Bass & Sound : Alice K.C 
 
Choreographer : Mukesh Nepali
Dance Team :    Tara, Diya, Dipshikha, Sabitri, Karishma, Kaira, kamala ,   
                             Namrata, Ganga.
         
Supporting Cast: 
                              Abinash Khati ( Madhu) 
                              Binod Shrestha 

Story/Direction: Jyotsna Yogi ‪‪‪‪@yogi.jyotsna 
DOP/Cinematography : Nihal Bhandari (Numa Films)
Editor/ Colorist : Anjon Limbu ( Numa Films)
Makeup and Hair : Mohan Sunuwar
Production Manager : Shyam Khadka
Location Manager: Shankar Parajuli
1st. Asst. Production : Sabal Thapa
2nd. Asst. Production : Anup Khadka

snippet.title: Awarapan 2 Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Awarapan 2 Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Emraan Hashmi & Disha Patani in Awarapan 2007 Sequel is an Open Challenge to Saiyaara Movie Records with Romance Pain & Lots of Action connected with Emotion & Old Emraan Hashmi Franchise Factor. Awarapan 2 Teaser Reaction & Trailer Expectations would be shared in this Video. Can Emraan Hashmi Comeback shock Sunny Deol & Bollywood or Mohit Suri Absence might be a big pressure to overcome? Do leave your comments below now!

#Awarapan2 #Awarapan2Teaser #Awarapan2Movie

snippet.title: 9th Anniversary Animation Trailer এসে গেছে! 🎉
snippet.description:
9th Anniversary Animation Trailer এসে গেছে! 🎉

Free Fire-এর ৯ম জন্মদিন একদম কাছেই, আর এবার জেগে উঠতে যাচ্ছে নতুন এক শক্তি... 👀

প্রস্তুত হোন নতুন স্কিল, নতুন কমব্যাট সম্ভাবনা আর আরও শক্তিশালী ব্যাটেলের জন্য। 🔥

আপনি কোন ধরনের স্কিল আপগ্রেড দেখতে চান?

সাথেই থাকুন Full Animation এবং 9th Anniversary-এর আরও চমকের জন্য।

#FreeFire9 #FreeFire9thAnniversary #Booyah

snippet.title: SAWLA BATEU ( Official Video ) Armaan Malik | Anjali 99 | Chirayu, Ayaan, Zaid, Tuba
snippet.description:
Disclaimer :- इस वीडियो में दिखाए गए सभी दृश्य, पात्र और घटनाएं पूरी तरह से काल्पनिक हैं।
इसका उद्देश्य केवल दर्शकों का मनोरंजन करना है।
इसका मकसद किसी भी समुदाय, संस्कृति, परंपरा या भावनाओं को ठेस पहुंचाना नहीं है।
पूरी Malik Family  और सारा  India बाल विवाह के खिलाफ है,
बाल विवाह एक सामाजिक बुराई और कानूनन अपराध है। यह वीडियो केवल मनोंरजन के लिए बनाई गयी है, हम सभी से अनुरोध करते हैं कि बाल विवाह जैसी कुप्रथा का विरोध करें
तथा बच्चों को शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य और उज्ज्वल भविष्य का अधिकार दिलाने में सहयोग करें
इस वीडियो के फिल्मांकन (Shooting) के दौरान इस्तेमाल किए गए घोड़े (पशु) की सुरक्षा और देखभाल का पूरा ध्यान रखा गया है।
वीडियो की शूटिंग के दौरान किसी भी जानवर को कोई नुकसान, चोट या प्रताड़ित नहीं किया गया है।सभी दृश्य विशेषज्ञों की देखरेख में और सुरक्षित माहौल में फिल्माए गए हैं।
इस वीडियो में छोटे बच्चों को पारंपरिक/शादी की पोशाक (Festive/Traditional Attire) केवल एक कलात्मक थीम और सांस्कृतिक अभिनय के हिस्से के रूप में पहनाई गई है।
यह प्रोडक्शन हाउस और इसके कलाकार बाल विवाह (Child Marriage) जैसी सामाजिक कुरीतियों का कड़ा विरोध करते हैं और किसी भी रूप में इसका समर्थन नहीं करते हैं।
वीडियो की शूटिंग पूरी तरह से बच्चों के माता-पिता/अभिभावकों (Parents/Guardians) की उपस्थिति, उनकी लिखित सहमति और सुरक्षित माहौल में की गई है।
फिल्मांकन के दौरान बच्चों की मानसिक और शारीरिक सुरक्षा का पूरा ध्यान रखा गया है।


Number 1 Records & Armaan Malik Presents New song " SAWLA BATEU "
Make a reel on this sound:-  

Song:-  SAWLA BATEU 
Staring:- Armaan Malik, Payal Malik, Kritika Malik, Chirayu, Zaid, Ayaan, Tuba , Navya Ramavat
Singer:- Armaan Malik, Anjali 99, Vinod Sorkhi
Lyrics & Composer:- Rohit Malik
Director:- Armaan Malik
Music:- Vikash Haryanvi
Producer:- Armaan Malik
Choreographer :- ADDY
Label:- Number 1 Records

#armaanmalik #payalmalik #kritikamalik 
 #zaidayaantuba

snippet.title: BABALII - DANG KO GHARI FT. KESHAV CHAUDHARY (OFFICAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Artist - Babalii
Prod l mix l Master - The Blank Production 
Rec l Durdharsha 
Flim By - Lil Chaman
Hook By - Keshav Chaudhary 

‘Dang Ko Ghari’ is inspired by the original song by Khadga Bahadur Budha. The emotions, melody, and soul of the original track sparked a new creative direction, allowing this version to reflect personal experiences while honoring the essence and artistry of the original work. Much respect to Khadga Bahadur Budha for the inspiration.”

snippet.title: THE ONE PIECE | Official Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
Eiichiro Oda’s manga "THE ONE PIECE" (originally serialized in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump in Japan) has become a cultural phenomenon with fans all around the globe, and now, it is being adapted as a new anime series, starting from the initial East Blue Saga. Produced by WIT Studio, giving viewers an opportunity to experience the adventures of Monkey D. Luffy and his Straw Hat Pirates by fully tapping into the expressive potential of modern technology to tell the story in a way that feels familiar yet fresh.
Streaming only on Netflix, February 2027.
#THEONEPIECE

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81594317

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

THE ONE PIECE | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

bn.title: মির্জাপুর দ্য মুভি ট্রেলার • রিঅ্যাকশন
bn.description:
#মির্জাপুর #দ্যপিজে #পিজেএক্সপ্লেইনড

আমার সোশ্যাল মিডিয়া হ্যান্ডেলগুলো: 
ইনস্টাগ্রাম: https://www.instagram.com/pjexplained/
টুইটার: https://twitter.com/pjexplained/
স্ন্যাপচ্যাট: https://www.snapchat.com/add/pjexplained

থ্রেডস: https://www.threads.net/@pjexplained 
ফেসবুক: https://www.facebook.com/pjexplained/
হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: https://shorturl.at/vQxpU

দ্যপিজে (thePJ) একটি ওয়েব চ্যানেল, যার উদ্দেশ্য হলো চলচ্চিত্র পর্যালোচনা, সাক্ষাৎকার, আলোচনা, ভিডিও প্রবন্ধ এবং বিশ্লেষণধর্মী সংকলনের মাধ্যমে সিনেমার প্রচার করা। এর প্রধান উদ্দেশ্য হলো সিনেমা নিয়ে তথ্যসমৃদ্ধ আলোচনা, সমালোচনা এবং পর্যালোচনাকে উৎসাহিত করা এবং এই লক্ষ্যে অনুষ্ঠানগুলোতে চলচ্চিত্র, শব্দ রেকর্ডিং এবং আলোকচিত্রের সংক্ষিপ্ত অংশ ব্যবহার করা হয়। এই ক্লিপ এবং অংশবিশেষগুলো খুবই সামান্য এবং এর ব্যবহার কপিরাইটের মালিকদের দ্বারা সম্পূর্ণ কাজটির বাণিজ্যিক ব্যবহারে কোনোভাবেই হস্তক্ষেপ করার উদ্দেশ্যে নয়। কাজগুলোর ব্যবহার কপিরাইট আইনের ৫২ ধারার অধীনে প্রদত্ত ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের ব্যতিক্রমের সাথে সঙ্গতিপূর্ণ, এবং আমরা সমালোচনা ও পর্যালোচনার জন্য প্রদত্ত ব্যতিক্রমের অধীনে কাজগুলো ব্যবহারের দাবি করি।

snippet.title: Jiwana Maya
snippet.description:
The song “जीवनमाया” reflects on the fragile, uncertain, and deeply emotional nature of life and
love.
At its core, it speaks about how life is temporary and unpredictable—filled with moments of
happiness and sorrow that coexist. The lyrics encourage living joyfully in the present (“laugh and
let this moment pass in happiness”), while acknowledging that nothing is permanent: if we meet
again, it will be a reunion; if not, memories will remain.
The song also touches on fate and helplessness, suggesting that certain things in life are already
written and cannot be changed, no matter how much we try. It warns against over-idealizing love
or blindly trusting everything (“don’t treat thorns like flowers”), emphasizing that love exists
alongside pain, loss, and emotional risk.
Overall, “जीवनमाया” is a reflective and philosophical piece about:
-the impermanence of life
-the bittersweet nature of love
-acceptance of destiny
-and the importance of cherishing present moments without fear of tomorrow
It leaves the listener with a gentle but emotional reminder: live, love, and accept that separation
and memory are both part of human experience.

snippet.title: Tere Paas Main|Main Vaapas Aaunga|@diljitdosanjh,@ARRahman,Imtiaz Ali,Irshad,Vedang,Sharvari,Deepali
snippet.description:
The unspoken promise of love. ❤️

Experience the heartfelt melody "Tere Paas Main" from the film Main Vaapas Aaunga. A soulful song that beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and the silent bond that keeps two hearts connected.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Composed, Produced, Arranged by A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil
Singer - Deepali Sahay
Mixed and Mastered by Nitish R Kumar
Music Supervisor & Editor - Hiral Viradia

Musicians:
Sarod - Rohan Prasanna
Tabla - Sai Shravanam
Flute - Naveen Kumar
Strings - Philharmonic Orchestra, Prague
Guitar - Shrey Gupta
Additional programming - Shubham Bhat, Marisakthi

Sound Engineers:
Panchathan Record Inn, Chennai
Senior engineers: Suresh Permal, Karthik Sekaran
Assisting engineers: Sathish V Saravanan, Bharath, Sarath Santhosh

Panchathan Record Inn, Mumbai
Senior engineer: Nitish R Kumar
Assisting engineer: Naval Chikhliya

Head of Technical Services: Riyasdeen Riyan
Dolby Atmos Music: Riyasdeen Riyan
Musician Coordinators: R Samidurai, Abdul Hayum

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Starring: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Music by: A. R. Rahman
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Written by Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani
Director Of Photography: Sylvester Fonseca, ISC
Production Designer: Suman Roy Mahapatra
Editor: Aarti Bajaj
Sound Designer & Production Sound Mixer: Dhiman Karmakar
Costume Designer: Sheetal Iqbal Sharma
Look Designer: Soamaa Goswami
Re-recording Mixer: Alok De
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Associate Director: Suraj Paraswani
First Assistant Director: Adrian Fernandes
Post Producer: Chinmay Ogale
Publicity Design: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Visual Effects: Phantom FX
Color: Redchillies.color
Visual Promotions: MA+TH
Digital Promotions: The Small Big Idea
Public Relations: Universal Communications
CMO & Head of Syndication: Sameer Chopra
WSF Marketing: Nidhi Sethia, Dhruv Sinha, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora, Virikkaa
Singhvi, Nibha Purawat
Applause Marketing: Devnidhi Bajoria, Apurva Patade, Leena Baidya, Tanvi Dedhia
Supervising Producer (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Co Producers: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More

Produced by Birla Studios & Applause Entertainment
Produced by Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Music on Tips Music Limited

Lyrics : 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaagaz Pe Koi Nazam Likhi Hai
Saanson Mein Likkhi/Rehti Nazam 
Jaise Paani Paas Pyaase
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Dil Ke Hain Dilaase
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jhooth Hain Ye Dooriyan
Jhooth Faasla Hai
Tujhe Roz Mil Raha Hun Main
Baat Ho Khayal Mein  
Jaise Honthon Mein Ho Laali
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaanon Mein Ho Baali
Tere Paas Main
 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main
 
Apni Kahani Utni Rahegi
Chaahe Badha Lo Chaahe Ghata Lo
Kajal Nahin Main Gaalon Ka Til Hun
Mit Ta Nahin Main Kitna Mita Lo
Mera To Hatna Mushqil Bada Hai 
Tum Saamne Se Sheesha Hata Lo 
Jaise Aankhon Ke Ishaare 
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Nadiya Ke Kinaare 
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jaise Neeci Nazar Mein Sharam Chhupi Hai
Saanson Mein Rehti Nazam
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main

snippet.title: Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Aakhri mulakat thi shayad...
isliye hum kuch keh na sake.

Tum saamne the...
magar dil ki baatein
dil me hi reh gayin.

Na jaane kyun us din
waqt itni jaldi guzar gaya...
aur hum bas tumhe dekhte hi reh gaye.

“Aakhri Mulakat”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo apni mohabbat se
aakhri baar mila...
aur phir kabhi mil na saka.

Kuch mulaqatein
sirf yaad ban kar reh jaati hain...
aur kuch log
zindagi bhar dil me bas jaate hain.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
judai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

shayad wahi hamari...
aakhri mulakat thi...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
aakhri baar milkar use hamesha ke liye kho diya ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

localized.title: Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
localized.description:
Aakhri Mulakat – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Aakhri mulakat thi shayad...
isliye hum kuch keh na sake.

Tum saamne the...
magar dil ki baatein
dil me hi reh gayin.

Na jaane kyun us din
waqt itni jaldi guzar gaya...
aur hum bas tumhe dekhte hi reh gaye.

“Aakhri Mulakat”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo apni mohabbat se
aakhri baar mila...
aur phir kabhi mil na saka.

Kuch mulaqatein
sirf yaad ban kar reh jaati hain...
aur kuch log
zindagi bhar dil me bas jaate hain.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
judai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

shayad wahi hamari...
aakhri mulakat thi...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
aakhri baar milkar use hamesha ke liye kho diya ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Leher (Official Video) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh B | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
Let this pyaar ki Leher wash over you 🥰✨

#Leher Song out now!

#arijitsingh #Cocktail2 in Cinemas Now!!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 
➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Directed by : Homi Adajania
🎤 Singer: Arijit Singh
🎶 Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
➟ Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya

#Cocktail2, In cinemas now 

🎬 Video Credits
➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran  
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly 
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics : 

Leher leher..
Behti ho ke saahil se bekhabar
Theher theher..
Kar lamhe kaise bante ye peher

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar

Geela hua jo tera badan
Bheega na jaane kyun mera mann

Yun to ye nazdeekiyan dono ki bewajah bhi hain
Inmein par jitna takalluf hai utna maza bhi hai

Hoti bhala kaise feeke savere ki
Namkeen si dopaher dopaher
Milta humein kaise dil ke veerane mein
Soya hua ek sheher

Leher leher..
Behti ho ke saahil se bekhabar
Theher theher..
Kar lamhe kaise bante ye peher

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar…

Mujhe tujh mein
Tujhe mujh mein
Tanha sa mila humsafar

Aa chhupa loon
Tujhe mujh mein
Milein phir na milein hum agar

Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main

Chaahe tootein sabhi kasmein
Par adhoora koi armaan na rahe

Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main
Tera tera tera tera main

Milte nahin hum agar
Milte nahin hum agar…

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | GRAND FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

This is it! The final day of the BMPS 2026 Grand Finals.

After an incredible journey through every stage of the tournament, it all comes down to one last day. Every elimination, every placement point, and every Chicken Dinner could decide who will be crowned the BMPS 2026 Champions.

Sixteen teams entered the Grand Finals, but only one will lift the trophy and etch their name into BMPS history.

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

Map Rotation

Match ⚔️2 : Erangel

This is it! The final day of the BMPS 2026 Grand Finals.

After an incredible journey through every stage of the tournament, it all comes down to one last day. Every elimination, every placement point, and every Chicken Dinner could decide who will be crowned the BMPS 2026 Champions.

Sixteen teams entered the Grand Finals, but only one will lift the trophy and etch their name into BMPS history.

snippet.title: Nachau Jhumera - Yogesh Lama | Lamu Sherpa | Ft. Bhimphedi Guys | Sanjana Gurung | Sagar | Rushlal
snippet.description:
🎵 "Nachau Jhumera" is an energetic dance song performed by Yogesh Lama and Lamu Sherpa. Written, composed, and arranged by Yogesh Lama, the song features catchy melodies and an engaging musical arrangement. Directed by Nirmal Kumar Lama, with choreography by Bhimphedi Guys and Sagar Lopchan, the video brings together the performances of Sanjana Gurung, Bhimphedi Guys, Sagar Lopchan, Rushal Syangbo and Rupchen Tamang, creating an entertaining visual and musical experience.

snippet.title: Mashooqa (Full HD Video) Kriti Sanon, Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna | Cocktail 2 Songs | Pritam
snippet.description:
Presenting the sizzling track "Mashooqa" from the highly anticipated romantic drama 'Cocktail 2'! Get ready to groove to this ultimate modern vibe composed by the hit machine Pritam and Mahmood, bringing a fresh wave of energy to your playlist. 

Hit 'LIKE' if you are playing this on loop, and don't forget to SUBSCRIBE for more exclusive tracks!


Track Credits:
🎤 Singers: Pritam, Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya, Raghav Chaitanya, Ruaa Kayy
🎵 Music Composer: Mahmood, Pritam
✍️ Lyricist: Mahmood, Amitabh Bhattacharya
🎬 Music Label: Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd. / Maddock Films Pvt. Ltd.

Movie Credits:
🎬 Movie: Cocktail 2
⭐ Starring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna, Dimple Kapadia, Rohit Saraf, Ishita Dutta
🎬 Director: Homi Adajania
💼 Producer: Dinesh Vijan (Maddock Films)
✍️ Writer: Luv Ranjan, Tarun Jain
📅 Theatrical Release Date: June 19, 2026

Lyrics:

Sai mi chiedo perché mi seduci quando ti avvicini 
Parli con la gente non capisco mai
Perché Lo fai 
Sembriamo amici Che finiranno nei guai 

(Come Get Me Now)x4

(Karein toh karein kya dil hai ..
Come get me Now 
Dil hai tabhi mushkil hai
Come get me Now ..) ×2

CROSS
Pade agar tere liye
Mar bhi jaana

Uff nahin kare deewana

Ma Ma Maashooqa
O My Mashooqa

Teer teri nazron ka
Toh kabhi na chooka

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka
Haye haye haye ..

ANTARA

Teer-e-nazar ka banaya tu ne
Jise bhi nishaana
Jaane kyon chaah ke bhi
Chaahe na vo ख़ुद ko bachana

Jise gale se ik PAL ke liye BHI tu laga le
Poori umar uss PAL mein
बिता le vo deewaana

Kaam deevanon ka
Hosh gavana hai
Aur haseenon pe
Dosh lagana hai 

Ma ..
Ma ma ma Maashooqa

O my Maashoqa
Teer teri nazron ka

Na kabhi chooka

Baby cosa c’è 
Parlami di te 

Resta fuori con me nel week end 

Baby non lo so
Forse partirò 
Dammi un segno 
Perché in fondo 
Tu qua vicino dimmi cosa ci fai 
Mi chiedi baby quanti  posti vedrai 

Andiamo nei 
BRUNEI 
Uk
LA
SE SAI 
DI FAKE 
ti saluterò

Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai

Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa Mashooqa 
Mashooqa Mashooqa Ma Mashooqa
Come Stai


#Mashooqa #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna #Pritam #NewHindiSong2026 #MaddockFilms #BollywoodSongs

Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.

new Song, tere ishq mein fanaa, new song 2026, romantic song hindi, sagar bairagi song, shahrukh khan style song, deepika padukone romantic song, bollywood romantic song, hindi love song 2026, heart touching song, sad love song, new hindi song, romantic music video, emotional hindi song, trending hindi song, couple romantic video, love story song, bollywood style song, latest hindi romantic song

LYRICS 📝

[Intro / आलाप]
आ आ आ...
रूह को तेरी रूह से जोड़ दूँ,
मैं ये जहाँ तेरे वास्ते छोड़ दूँ...

[मुखड़ा / Chorus]
नज़र में तेरी ही बसी मंज़िलें हैं,
मेरा दिल भी अब तो मेरी सुनता नहीं है।
तुझे चाहने की ख़ता कर चुका हूँ,
ये वो दर्द है जो कभी रुकता नहीं है।

मेरे दिल की सुन ले ये आख़िरी सदा,
तू ही इब्तिदा है, तू ही इम्तिहान।

तेरे इश्क़ में हो जाऊँ फ़ना,
मुझे ख़ुद से ही तू अब रिहा कर जा।
तेरे इश्क़ में हो जाऊँ फ़ना,
मेरा दीन भी तू, मेरा ख़ुदा कर जा।

[अंतरा 1]
तसव्वुर में तेरे ही रातें ढली हैं,
तेरी खुशबू से मेरी साँसें चली हैं।
मोहब्बत में तेरी ये कैसा असर है,
जहाँ देखूँ, तू ही तू हर सू खिला है।

तेरा रुख़सार जैसे कोई नूर-ए-सहर है,
मेरी तिश्नगी को बस तेरी फ़िक्र है।
कहीं मर न जाऊँ मैं इस तिश्नगी में,
मेरा ज़िक्र कर दे तू अपनी ख़ुदी में।

मेरे दिल की सुन ले ये आख़िरी सदा,
तू ही इब्तिदा है, तू ही इम्तिहान।

तेरे इश्क़ में हो जाऊँ फ़ना,
मुझे ख़ुद से ही तू अब रिहा कर जा।

[अंतरा 2]
पाकीज़ा है कितनी ये तेरी चाहत,
मिली भटके रास्ते को जैसे हिदायत।
सजदा भी बदल गया अब बंदगी में,
मेरा हर एक लम्हा है तेरी हिफाज़त।

मिट जाए ये हस्ती जो तू मुस्कुराए,
मेरा हर एक क़तरा तेरा नाम गाए।
तू नसीब है मेरा, तू ही मेरा सहारा,
ढूंढ लिया रूह ने तुझमें अपना किनारा।


[ब्रिज / हाई पिच]
अक्स तेरा मेरे आईने से कभी ना हटे,
ज़िंदगी की ये रातें तेरे बिन ना कटे।
तू शमा है तो परवाना मैं बनूँ,
दुआ में बस अब यही हर पल कहूँ...


[आउट्रो]
हाँ... फ़ना... हो जाऊँ फ़ना...
तेरे इश्क़ में... फ़ना...

bn.title: ROBLOX-এ অ্যানিম্যাল হসপিটালের অদ্ভুত সব কাণ্ডকারখানা থেকে পালান !!
bn.description:
রোবলক্সে পশু হাসপাতালের অদ্ভুত জীবদের থেকে পালান!!

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে “ন্যায্য ব্যবহার”-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

#roblox #miniarmy #minireborn

Lyrics for "Vishal Shekhar, Shafqat Amanat Ali, Sunidhi Chauhan - Bin Tere"

ऊ ऊ ऊ ऊ ऊ  
तेरी निगाहों के  
तेरी ही राहों के  
करीब से गयी जिंदगी  
तुझे क्यूँ देखा ना  
तुझे क्यूँ जाना ना  
शिकायतें करू या नही  
थमी है यह साँसें  
परी है यह आँखें  
सहू कैसे अब यह फासला  
बिन तेरे बिन तेरे बिन तेरे  
कोई खलिश है हवाओ में बिन तेरे  
बिन तेरे बिन तेरे बिन तेरे  
कोई खलिश है हवाओ में बिन तेरे  
कुछ बचा ही नही दरमियाँ  
साँस लेती है अब यह दूरियाँ  
दिल नही जानता राहों में  
हाथ से हाथ छूटे थे कहाँ  
क्यूँ नज़र के किनारे  
टूटे है खाब सारे तू बता  
सुना सुना समा है  
खाली खाली जहाँ है अब मेरा  
बिन तेरे बिन तेरे बिन तेरे  
कोई खलिश है हवाओ में बिन तेरे  
ओ बिन तेरे बिन तेरे बिन तेरे  
कोई खलिश है हवाओ में बिन तेरे  

〰=〰=〰=〰=〰

snippet.title: Sannani | Bikash X Beon X Pawan | Dreamstage Production
snippet.description:
SANNANI (Official Music Video Release)  By Dreamstage Productions 
Subscribe to DreamStage Productions to stay updated with our latest music videos, exclusive releases, and exciting upcoming projects. Thank you for your support—more amazing content is on the way!
Stay tuned for future releases and be part of our musical journey.
https://www.youtube.com/@UCknIU_nxhciR_kaB7mONdwQ 

Presenting the official music video of "Sannani," one of the most viral Nepali TikTok songs, reaching over 20 million people across social media platforms. This track combines catchy melodies, energetic beats, and an experimental musical style to create a unique listening experience. Originally released as an audio track on May 20, 2026, "Sannani" quickly became a major TikTok sensation. 

Audio Credits:
Vocals: Bikash Chandra Thapa, Beon Beats, Pawan Chand
Studio : Dreamstage Recording Studios
Producer/mix-master: Beon Beats
Featuring: Bikash, Beon, Pawan 
Genre: Nepali Melodic Hip-Hop, Experimental Song
Music Video Official Release 2026
Ownership Protected by : SwarVision Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.  
If you enjoyed the song, don't forget to:
Like, Comment, Subscribe & Share with your friends.

Production House: LOCOLIZE CREATIVES PVT. LTD.

localized.description:
SANNANI (Official Music Video Release)  By Dreamstage Productions 
Subscribe to DreamStage Productions to stay updated with our latest music videos, exclusive releases, and exciting upcoming projects. Thank you for your support—more amazing content is on the way!
Stay tuned for future releases and be part of our musical journey.
https://www.youtube.com/@UCknIU_nxhciR_kaB7mONdwQ 

Presenting the official music video of "Sannani," one of the most viral Nepali TikTok songs, reaching over 20 million people across social media platforms. This track combines catchy melodies, energetic beats, and an experimental musical style to create a unique listening experience. Originally released as an audio track on May 20, 2026, "Sannani" quickly became a major TikTok sensation. 

Audio Credits:
Vocals: Bikash Chandra Thapa, Beon Beats, Pawan Chand
Studio : Dreamstage Recording Studios
Producer/mix-master: Beon Beats
Featuring: Bikash, Beon, Pawan 
Genre: Nepali Melodic Hip-Hop, Experimental Song
Music Video Official Release 2026
Ownership Protected by : SwarVision Entertainment Pvt. Ltd.  
If you enjoyed the song, don't forget to:
Like, Comment, Subscribe & Share with your friends.

snippet.title: GOD STYLE  | YO YO HONEY SINGH | Hommie Dilliwala | Full Video
snippet.description:
Here's  #GodStyle by Yo Yo Honey Singh.
Song : GOD STYLE 
*SINGER : YO YO HONEY SINGH* 
Lyrics: Hommie dilliwala
Music producer: *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Composer : *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Mixed by : *YO YO HONEY SINGH*
Mastered by : Hommie Dilliwala
Directed by : Pitch Gray
Executive producer: Passant Shams Ell Dean
Digital Strategy : Rajdeep Mayer
Graphics /Posters : RDM Media
Digital marketing & Campaign : RDM Media and Bull18 

Production house- Tash Films Creations
Line Producer- Aadesh Gola
Unit production manager- Prashant Rohilla
Production Manager- Ashish Moudgil
Makeup (YYHS)- Pallavi Kapoor
Makeup (Feature artist)- Pallavi kapoor and team
Stylist (Yo Yo Honey Singh) - Akanksha Bhakoo
Stylist (Feature Artist)- Tanya Mehrotra
Production Design, Art Direction & Set Execution- Varun Kumar(@beardseyeview) and Rishabh Chadha
Casting - Anil Kumar (Ak Films)

Lyrics :- 

Aya Vijayta 
Khuda ka chaheta 
Yodha hai subhe wo 
Raat ko dracula 
Beat’ein hai sajata 
Rokda chabata 
Hater ko nachata 
Karwata bachata 

Kara ni diss abhi Fir bhi ye baithe hai sehem ke 
Duniya kehti yoyo thoda Toh rehem de 

Ikyavan gaane daale 
Jal ke kaale saale 
Chaabi faiki maine 
Muh pe maare taale 

Inke ney gaane lagte 
Jaise puraane 
Music sudharne 
bheja hai khuda ne 

RAP GOD Poori duniya nacha di 
RAP GOD Aesi kismat humarii
RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi 
Im handpicked by uparwala hi 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

yaar mila de 
Pyaar mila de 
Zyada nee bus 
Ek baar mila de 
Rakhlunga bottal me 
Rooh me fasa ke 
Jhukti duniya 
Jo hum haat utha de 

Matlabi Matlabi duniya 
Kaale naag ki karwat duniya 
Karti Chal kapat ye duniya 
Jalti har wakat ye duniya 

Zehereela sa sharbat duniya 
Beimaani si barkat duniya 
Be wajah ki harkat duniya 
I dont give a fuck to duniya 

Thaali khali jali bando ki kar daali 
Taali taali maare duniya saari taali 
Kali cadi kare noton ki rakhwali
Aisa dahaada ki duniya hee chaba li 

Bhaagte rapper hai haanfte 
Mootu taezaab inke carrier graph pe
Daily kankalo pe chadh ke naachte 
Nasha bharwane aate humse saanp ye 

LAVA HAI FLOW 
BACHO HATO 
DUNIYA ME 100
CHALAVE KYU 

Jaisa hu rehna du kyunki mai dheeth better 
Kabhi michael hu kabhi mai heath ledger 

RAP GOD Poori duniya nacha di 
RAP GOD Aesi kismat humare 
RAP GOD Macha di tabaahi

snippet.title: [EN] 2026 PMMI Group Stage Day 1
snippet.description:
🔴  2026 PUBG MOBILE MACAO INVITATIONAL 🔴

🔥One vs All !

🔈2026 PMMI will unfold in two stages across six heated competition days.
🌍 This tournament will feature 25 top-tier teams from multiple regions worldwide.

🗓 Group Stage Days
● June 29 (Mon) - 17:20 (GMT+8:00)
● June 30 (Tue) - 17:20 (GMT+8:00)
● July 1 (Wed) - 17:20 (GMT+8:00)

Finals
● July 3 (Fri) - 15:40 (GMT+8:00)
● July 4 (Sat) - 15:40 (GMT+8:00)
● July 5 (Sun) - 16:00 (GMT+8:00)

🎖️Participating teams
GOAT  #2026 PMGO S1 EECA #2
A7 #2025 PMGC #1
AURORA  #2026 PMGO S1 EECA #1
BTR #2025 PMHI #3
DK #2026 PMPS S1 #5
EA  #2026 PMGO S1 SEA #2
FURIA  #2026 PMGO S1 SAM #1
INF # 2026 PMGO S1 SAM #5
KONE  # 2026 PEL Spring #7
KRX #2026 PMPS S1 #4
KSG  # 2026 PEL Spring #5
LGD  # 2026 PEL Spring #3
NGX  #2026 PMGO S1 MENA #2
NS #2026 PMPS S1 #1  
REG # 2025 PMGO #1
RRQ  #2026 PMGO S1 SEA #3 
S2G #2026 PMGO S1 TUR #4
TIANBA  # 2026 PEL Spring #6
TT  # 2026 PEL Spring #2
ULA  #2026 PMGO S1 MENA #1
ULF # 2026 PMGO S1 TUR #1
WBG  # 2025 PMHI #1
WOL  # 2026 PMGO S1 NA  #1  
YG #2025 PMWC #1
AG # 2026 PEL Spring #1

💸 Total prize pool：$440,000 USD

🔔Format
●  24 teams divided into three groups. Each group plays six matches against each other, and the 15 teams with the highest total points advance to the finals.
●  PEL Spring Split champion AG qualifies directly for the final stage. 16 teams will compete in a total of 18  matches over three days to contend for the final championship.

🔔Smash rule
● Reach match point and secure a WWCD in the next matches to become the champion.
● Match point: rank#1 in points + 10 points at the end of the match 12/18 (Day2)
● If no wins by smash after 18 matches, the team ranked #1 by overall points wins!"

pa.title: 29 ਜੂਨ, 2026 | ਅਰਜਨਟੀਨਾ ਬਨਾਮ ਜਰਮਨੀ | FIFA World Cup 26 | WC26 | ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ | FC26 ਗੇਮਪਲੇਅ
pa.description:
✅ ਸਤਿ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਅਕਾਲ,
ਇਸ ਰੋਮਾਂਚਕ ਫੀਫਾ ਵਿਸ਼ਵ ਕੱਪ 2026 (WC26) ਗਰੁੱਪ ਸਟੇਜ ਮੈਚ ਵਿੱਚ, EA ਸਪੋਰਟਸ FC26 ਵਿੱਚ ਦੁਬਾਰਾ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤੇ ਗਏ, ਅਰਜਨਟੀਨਾ ਦਾ ਜਰਮਨੀ ਨਾਲ ਮੁਕਾਬਲਾ ਹੋਣ 'ਤੇ ਇੱਕ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੀ ਮਹੱਤਵਪੂਰਨ ਬਲਾਕਬਸਟਰ ਅਤੇ ਹਾਈ ਵੋਲਟੇਜ ਫੁੱਟਬਾਲ ਟਕਰਾਅ ਦਾ ਅਨੁਭਵ ਕਰੋ! ਅਰਜਨਟੀਨਾ ਆਤਮਵਿਸ਼ਵਾਸ ਅਤੇ ਸੁਭਾਅ ਨਾਲ ਪਿੱਚ 'ਤੇ ਕਦਮ ਰੱਖਦਾ ਹੈ, ਆਪਣੀ ਦਸਤਖਤ ਤੇਜ਼ ਪਾਸਿੰਗ, ਰਚਨਾਤਮਕ ਪਲੇਮੇਕਿੰਗ ਅਤੇ ਹਮਲਾਵਰ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਭਾ ਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਦਰਸ਼ਨ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਜਰਮਨੀ, ਜੋ ਆਪਣੇ ਅਨੁਸ਼ਾਸਨ ਅਤੇ ਕੁਸ਼ਲਤਾ ਲਈ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ, ਮਜ਼ਬੂਤ ​​ਸੰਗਠਨ, ਬੁੱਧੀਮਾਨ ਸਥਿਤੀ ਅਤੇ ਕਲੀਨਿਕਲ ਫਿਨਿਸ਼ਿੰਗ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਇੱਕ ਸੰਤੁਲਿਤ ਪਹੁੰਚ ਲਿਆਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ। 

✅ ਕੌਣ ਸਿਖਰ 'ਤੇ ਆਵੇਗਾ—ਅਰਜਨਟੀਨਾ ਆਪਣੇ ਸੁਭਾਅ ਨਾਲ ਜਾਂ ਜਰਮਨੀ ਆਪਣੀ ਸ਼ੁੱਧਤਾ ਨਾਲ? ਅੰਤਿਮ ਸੀਟੀ ਤੱਕ ਜੁੜੇ ਰਹੋ! ਇਸ ਤੋਂ ਇਲਾਵਾ, ਜੇਕਰ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਹੈ ਤਾਂ ਹੋਰ fc 26 ਰੀਐਲੇਟਿਡ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਲਈ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਗੇਮਿੰਗ ਚੈਨਲ ਨੂੰ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰਨਾ ਚਾਹੀਦਾ ਹੈ। ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦਾ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ।

✅ ਹੋਰ ਵੀਡੀਓ:

ja.description:
✅ こんにちは！
EA Sports FC26で再現された、FIFAワールドカップ2026（WC26）グループステージのアルゼンチン対ドイツ戦という、非常に重要な、そして白熱したサッカーの激闘を体験してください！アルゼンチンは自信と華麗さを胸にピッチに立ち、持ち前の素早いパスワーク、創造的なプレーメイキング、そして華麗な攻撃力で相手を圧倒します。一方、規律と効率性で知られるドイツは、組織力、的確なポジショニング、そして決定力に優れたバランスの取れたアプローチで挑みます。

✅ 華麗なプレーで勝利を掴むのはアルゼンチンか、それとも正確なプレーで勝利を掴むのはドイツか？試合終了のホイッスルまでお見逃しなく！この動画が気に入ったら、FC26関連の動画をもっと見たい方は、ぜひ私たちのゲームチャンネルを登録してください。ありがとうございます。

te.description:
✅ నమస్కారం,

EA Sports FC26 లో పునఃసృష్టించబడిన ఈ ఉత్కంఠభరితమైన FIFA ప్రపంచ కప్ 2026 (WC26) గ్రూప్ స్టేజ్ మ్యాచ్‌లో అర్జెంటీనా, జర్మనీ తలపడనుండగా, ఒక అత్యంత ముఖ్యమైన, బ్లాక్‌బస్టర్ మరియు హై వోల్టేజ్ ఫుట్‌బాల్ పోరును అనుభవించండి! అర్జెంటీనా ఆత్మవిశ్వాసంతో, నైపుణ్యంతో మైదానంలోకి అడుగుపెడుతుంది, తమదైన వేగవంతమైన పాసింగ్, సృజనాత్మక ప్లేమేకింగ్ మరియు అద్భుతమైన దాడిని ప్రదర్శిస్తుంది. క్రమశిక్షణ మరియు సామర్థ్యానికి పేరుగాంచిన జర్మనీ, పటిష్టమైన వ్యవస్థీకరణ, తెలివైన పొజిషనింగ్ మరియు కచ్చితమైన ఫినిషింగ్‌తో సమతుల్యమైన విధానాన్ని తీసుకువస్తుంది.

✅ ఎవరు విజయం సాధిస్తారు—తమ నైపుణ్యంతో అర్జెంటీనానా లేక తమ కచ్చితత్వంతో జర్మనీనా? చివరి విజిల్ వరకు చూస్తూనే ఉండండి! అంతేకాకుండా, మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చితే, మరిన్ని FC 26 సంబంధిత వీడియోల కోసం మా గేమింగ్ ఛానెల్‌కు తప్పకుండా సబ్‌స్క్రైబ్ చేసుకోండి. అందరికీ ధన్యవాదాలు.

uk.title: 29 червня 2026 р. | Аргентина проти Німеччини | Чемпіонат світу з футболу 26 | ЧС26 | Футбол | Ге...
uk.description:
✅ Привіт,
Переживіть дуже важливий блокбастер та футбольний матч високої напруги, де Аргентина зустрінеться з Німеччиною у цьому захопливому матчі групового етапу Чемпіонату світу з футболу 2026 (WC26), відтвореному в EA Sports FC26! Аргентина виходить на поле з упевненістю та талантом, демонструючи свої фірмові швидкі паси, креативну гру та блискучу атаку. Німеччина, відома своєю дисципліною та ефективністю, пропонує збалансований підхід з сильною організацією, розумним позиціонуванням та клінічним завершенням.

✅ Хто переможе — Аргентина зі своїм талантом чи Німеччина зі своєю точністю? Слідкуйте за оновленнями до фінального свистка! Крім того, якщо вам сподобалося відео, обов'язково підпишіться на наш ігровий канал, щоб отримувати більше відео, пов'язаних з FC 26. Дякуємо всім.

hi.title: 29 जून, 2026 | अर्जेंटीना बनाम जर्मनी | FIFA वर्ल्ड कप 26 | WC26 | फुटबॉल | FC26 गेमप्ले
hi.description:
✅ नमस्कार!
ईए स्पोर्ट्स एफसी26 में फिर से तैयार किए गए फीफा विश्व कप 2026 (WC26) ग्रुप स्टेज के इस रोमांचक मुकाबले में अर्जेंटीना और जर्मनी के बीच एक बेहद महत्वपूर्ण और हाई वोल्टेज फुटबॉल मुकाबले का अनुभव करें! अर्जेंटीना आत्मविश्वास और जोश से भरी हुई मैदान पर उतरती है, अपनी खास तेज पासिंग, रचनात्मक खेल और शानदार आक्रमण का प्रदर्शन करती है। वहीं, अनुशासन और दक्षता के लिए जानी जाने वाली जर्मनी, मजबूत संगठन, सटीक पोजीशनिंग और बेहतरीन फिनिशिंग के साथ संतुलित खेल खेलती है।

✅ कौन जीतेगा - अर्जेंटीना अपने शानदार खेल से या जर्मनी अपनी सटीकता से? आखिरी सीटी बजने तक देखते रहिए! इसके अलावा, अगर आपको वीडियो पसंद आया तो एफसी 26 से संबंधित और वीडियो के लिए हमारे गेमिंग चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें। धन्यवाद।

Przeżyj niezwykle ważne, przebojowe i pełne napięcia starcie piłkarskie, gdy Argentyna zmierzy się z Niemcami w tym emocjonującym meczu fazy grupowej Mistrzostw Świata FIFA 2026 (WC26), odtworzonym w EA Sports FC26! Argentyna wchodzi na boisko z pewnością siebie i polotem, prezentując swoje charakterystyczne szybkie podania, kreatywną grę i ofensywny geniusz. Niemcy, znani z dyscypliny i skuteczności, prezentują zrównoważone podejście z silną organizacją, inteligentnym ustawianiem się i skutecznym wykończeniem akcji.

✅ Kto zwycięży – Argentyna ze swoim polotem, czy Niemcy ze swoją precyzją? Bądźcie czujni do ostatniego gwizdka! Poza tym, jeśli spodobał Ci się film, koniecznie zasubskrybuj nasz kanał gamingowy, aby zobaczyć więcej filmów związanych z FC26. Dzięki wszystkim.

L'Argentina scende in campo con sicurezza e stile, mettendo in mostra il suo caratteristico gioco di passaggi veloci, la creatività e la brillantezza offensiva. La Germania, nota per la sua disciplina ed efficienza, propone un approccio equilibrato con una solida organizzazione, un posizionamento intelligente e una finalizzazione impeccabile.

✅ Chi la spunterà: l'Argentina con il suo stile o la Germania con la sua precisione? Resta sintonizzato fino al fischio finale! Inoltre, se ti è piaciuto il video, iscriviti al nostro canale di gaming per altri video relativi a FC26. Grazie a tutti.

bn.title: ২৯ জুন, ২০২৬ | আর্জেন্টিনা বনাম জার্মানি | ফিফা বিশ্বকাপ ২৬ | ডব্লিউসি২৬ | ফুটবল | এফসি২৬ গেমপ্লে
bn.description:
✅ হাই,
EA Sports FC26-এ পুনরায় তৈরি করা এই রোমাঞ্চকর ফিফা বিশ্বকাপ ২০২৬ (WC26) গ্রুপ পর্বের ম্যাচে আর্জেন্টিনা ও জার্মানির মধ্যকার একটি অত্যন্ত গুরুত্বপূর্ণ ব্লকবাস্টার ও হাই-ভোল্টেজ ফুটবল লড়াইয়ের অভিজ্ঞতা নিন! আর্জেন্টিনা আত্মবিশ্বাস ও শৈলী নিয়ে মাঠে নামছে, তাদের নিজস্ব দ্রুত পাসিং, সৃজনশীল প্লেমেকিং এবং আক্রমণাত্মক নৈপুণ্য প্রদর্শন করে। জার্মানি, তাদের শৃঙ্খলা এবং দক্ষতার জন্য পরিচিত, শক্তিশালী সংগঠন, বুদ্ধিদীপ্ত পজিশনিং এবং নিখুঁত ফিনিশিংয়ের মাধ্যমে একটি ভারসাম্যপূর্ণ কৌশল নিয়ে আসছে।

✅ কে জিতবে—তাদের শৈলী নিয়ে আর্জেন্টিনা নাকি তাদের নির্ভুলতা নিয়ে জার্মানি? শেষ বাঁশি পর্যন্ত আমাদের সাথেই থাকুন! এছাড়াও, ভিডিওটি ভালো লাগলে FC26 সম্পর্কিত আরও ভিডিওর জন্য অবশ্যই আমাদের গেমিং চ্যানেলটি সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন। সবাইকে ধন্যবাদ।

ko.title: 2026년 6월 29일 | 아르헨티나 vs 독일 | 2026 FIFA 월드컵 | WC26 | 축구 | FC26 게임플레이
ko.description:
✅ 안녕하세요!
EA Sports FC26에서 재현된 스릴 넘치는 FIFA 월드컵 2026(WC26) 조별 리그 경기에서 아르헨티나와 독일이 맞붙습니다! 아르헨티나는 빠른 패스, 창의적인 플레이메이킹, 그리고 화려한 공격력을 앞세워 자신감 넘치는 모습으로 경기장에 나섭니다. 반면, 규율과 효율성으로 유명한 독일은 탄탄한 조직력, 지능적인 포지셔닝, 그리고 정확한 마무리를 바탕으로 균형 잡힌 경기를 펼칩니다.

✅ 화려한 플레이를 선보이는 아르헨티나와 정교한 플레이를 펼치는 독일 중 누가 승리할까요? 경기 종료 휘슬이 울릴 때까지 놓치지 마세요! 영상이 마음에 드셨다면 저희 게임 채널을 구독하여 FC26 관련 영상을 더 많이 시청하세요. 감사합니다!

ta.title: 29 ஜூன், 2026 | அர்ஜென்டினா vs ஜெர்மனி | பிஃபா உலகக் கோப்பை 26 | WC26 | கால்பந்து | FC26 கேம்ப்ளே
ta.description:
✅ வணக்கம்,
EA Sports FC26-ல் மீண்டும் உருவாக்கப்பட்ட இந்த விறுவிறுப்பான FIFA உலகக் கோப்பை 2026 (WC26) குழு நிலை ஆட்டத்தில், அர்ஜென்டினா ஜெர்மனியை எதிர்கொள்ளும் மிக முக்கியமான, பிரம்மாண்டமான மற்றும் உயர் அழுத்த கால்பந்து மோதலை அனுபவியுங்கள்! அர்ஜென்டினா நம்பிக்கையுடனும் திறமையுடனும் களத்தில் இறங்கி, தங்களின் தனித்துவமான வேகமான பாஸிங், ஆக்கப்பூர்வமான ஆட்டத்தை உருவாக்கும் திறன் மற்றும் தாக்குதல் மேன்மையை வெளிப்படுத்துகிறது. தங்களின் ஒழுக்கம் மற்றும் செயல்திறனுக்காக அறியப்பட்ட ஜெர்மனி, வலுவான ஒருங்கிணைப்பு, புத்திசாலித்தனமான நிலைநிறுத்தம் மற்றும் துல்லியமான ஃபினிஷிங் ஆகியவற்றுடன் ஒரு சமநிலையான அணுகுமுறையைக் கொண்டுவருகிறது.

✅ யார் வெற்றி பெறுவார்கள்—தங்களின் திறமையுடன் அர்ஜென்டினாவா அல்லது தங்களின் துல்லியத்துடன் ஜெர்மனியா? இறுதி விசில் வரை காத்திருங்கள்! மேலும், இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருந்தால், FC 26 தொடர்பான மேலும் பல வீடியோக்களுக்கு எங்கள் கேமிங் சேனலை சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள். அனைவருக்கும் நன்றி.

iw.title: 29 ביוני 2026 | ארגנטינה נגד גרמניה | מונדיאל 26 | WC26 | כדורגל | משחק FC26
iw.description:
✅ היי,
חוו משחק כדורגל חשוב מאוד, שובר קופות ומתח גבוה, כאשר ארגנטינה תפגוש את גרמניה במשחק שלב הבתים המותח הזה של מונדיאל 2026 (WC26), ששוחזר ב-EA Sports FC26! ארגנטינה עולה למגרש בביטחון ובכשרון, ומציגה את המסירות המהירות הייחודיות שלה, את יכולות המשחק היצירתיות ואת יכולות ההתקפה המבריקות שלה. גרמניה, הידועה במשמעת וביעילות שלה, מביאה גישה מאוזנת עם ארגון חזק, מיקום חכם וסיומת קלינית.

✅ מי תצא מנצח - ארגנטינה עם הכישרון שלה או גרמניה עם הדיוק שלה? הישארו מעודכנים עד לשריקת הסיום! חוץ מזה, אם אהבתם את הסרטון, הירשמו לערוץ המשחקים שלנו לסרטונים נוספים של FC 26. תודה לכולם.

nl-NL.description:

Beleef een zeer belangrijke en spannende voetbalclash tussen Argentinië en Duitsland in deze sensationele groepswedstrijd van het FIFA Wereldkampioenschap 2026 (WC26), nagespeeld in EA Sports FC26! ml.title: 29 ജൂൺ, 2026 | അർജന്റീന vs ജർമ്മനി | ഫിഫ ലോകകപ്പ് 26 | WC26 | ഫുട്ബോൾ | FC26 ഗെയിംപ്ലേ
ml.description:
✅ ഹായ്,
2026 ഫിഫ വേൾഡ് കപ്പ് (WC26) ഗ്രൂപ്പ് സ്റ്റേജ് മത്സരത്തിൽ അർജന്റീന ജർമ്മനിയെ നേരിടുമ്പോൾ വളരെ പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട ഒരു ബ്ലോക്ക്ബസ്റ്ററും ഹൈ വോൾട്ടേജ് ഫുട്ബോൾ പോരാട്ടവും അനുഭവിക്കൂ, EA സ്പോർട്സ് FC26-ൽ പുനഃസൃഷ്ടിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നു! അർജന്റീന ആത്മവിശ്വാസത്തോടെയും വൈഭവത്തോടെയും മൈതാനത്തേക്ക് ചുവടുവെക്കുന്നു, അവരുടെ സിഗ്നേച്ചർ ക്വിക്ക് പാസിംഗ്, ക്രിയേറ്റീവ് പ്ലേമേക്കിംഗ്, ആക്രമണ വൈഭവം എന്നിവ പ്രദർശിപ്പിക്കുന്നു. അച്ചടക്കത്തിനും കാര്യക്ഷമതയ്ക്കും പേരുകേട്ട ജർമ്മനി, ശക്തമായ ഓർഗനൈസേഷൻ, ബുദ്ധിപരമായ പൊസിഷനിംഗ്, ക്ലിനിക്കൽ ഫിനിഷിംഗ് എന്നിവ ഉപയോഗിച്ച് സമതുലിതമായ സമീപനം കൊണ്ടുവരുന്നു. 

✅ ആരാണ് മുന്നിൽ - അവരുടെ വൈഭവമുള്ള അർജന്റീനയോ അതോ കൃത്യതയുള്ള ജർമ്മനിയോ? ഫൈനൽ വിസിൽ വരെ കാത്തിരിക്കുക! കൂടാതെ, നിങ്ങൾക്ക് വീഡിയോ ഇഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടെങ്കിൽ കൂടുതൽ FC 26 റിയലേറ്റഡ് വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി ഞങ്ങളുടെ ഗെയിമിംഗ് ചാനലിൽ സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യുക. എല്ലാവർക്കും നന്ദി.

✅ Hola,
¡Vive un emocionante y trepidante partido de fútbol entre Argentina y Alemania en este vibrante encuentro de la fase de grupos de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 (CM26), recreado en EA Sports FC26! Argentina salta al campo con confianza y estilo, mostrando su característico juego de pases rápidos, creatividad y brillantez ofensiva. Alemania, conocida por su disciplina y eficiencia, presenta un enfoque equilibrado con una sólida organización, posicionamiento inteligente y una definición impecable.

✅ ¿Quién se alzará con la victoria: Argentina con su estilo o Alemania con su precisión? ¡No te pierdas el final! Además, si te gustó el video, suscríbete a nuestro canal de videojuegos para ver más videos relacionados con FC26. ¡Gracias a todos!

Music video by Chinoetales Production.

(2026)                  : Hamro Events (Canada)


Cast : 
Abhishek Khadka , Parika Bhandari

Supporting act : 
Amar Babu (Brother), Badri Pudasaini (Father), Ganu Koirala (Mother)

Director : Abhi Sampang Rai

Production Manager: Shyam Khadka
Assist prod: Arbin Uranw, Shankar Parajuli, Dhiraj Thapa Magar, Ashish Shrestha

Puju Shrestha, Ranju Nepal, Sundar Pariyar, Dipak Gajamer, Sagar Panta, Jaya Ram Bhatta, DP Bhattarai, Sailendra Raj Bhattarai, Radha Krishna Bhatta, Mana Maya Magar, Prem Nath Pathak, Anita Giri, Suprina Nepal, Abshiek Rai, Radhika Thapa, Laxmi Budha, Anshika Gurung, Sandesh Tamang, Samir Diyali, Sujata Magar, ⁠Samita Tamang, Namaraj Pokhral


Special Thanks : 
 
Parbat Bhandari dai for having such blind faith on us. Kiran Pratap Singh bhai for guiding us through this beautiful journey. Ashtrona - you are a true Artist and beautiful inspiring soul we have come across. Prajesh (Harmonium musicals) dai for constantly supporting us from day 1. 
Snehi Karmacharya, Arshia Shrestha, Dolmu Sherpa, Crishtina Tamang for supporting constantly and holding hands on this journey to follow this dream. Saswot shrestha bhai for handling the craziness we bring to your studio.

Slick pick for producing such great Merch for us.

pa.description:

snippet.title: 𝐁𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐢 𝐆𝐮𝐥𝐮𝐠𝐮𝐥𝐢 𝐒𝐧𝐚𝐧𝐚 𝐏𝐮𝐧𝐞𝐢 | New Snana Purnima Bhajan | ଭାରି ଗୁଳୁଗୁଳି ସ୍ନାନ ପୁନେଇଁ | 𝐀𝐝𝐲𝐚 𝐀𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐤𝐚
snippet.description:
ସ୍ନାନ ପୁର୍ଣ୍ଣିମାର ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ଅବସରରେ କାଳିଆ ସାଆନ୍ତଙ୍କ ଚରଣାରବିନ୍ଦରେ ଏକ କ୍ଷୁଦ୍ର ଭକ୍ତି ଅର୍ଘ୍ୟ। ଭାରି ଗୁଳୁଗୁଳିର ସେଇ ଗହଳି ଭିତରେ, ସ୍ନାନ ମଣ୍ଡପରେ ଅବସ୍ଥାପିତ ଚକାନୟନଙ୍କୁ ଦେଖି ଭକ୍ତର ମନରେ ଉଠୁଥିବା ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ— "କାଳିଆ ତୁ କେମିତିକା ଠାକୁର"। କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ଆଦ୍ୟା ଆଦ୍ରିକା (Adya Adrika) ଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ ଏହି ଭଜନଟି ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଆଖିରେ ଲୁହ ଏବଂ ହୃଦୟରେ ଭକ୍ତିର ଜୁଆର ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବ।

ଯଦି ଏହି ଭଜନଟି ଆପଣଙ୍କ ମନକୁ ଛୁଇଁଥାଏ, ତେବେ ଭିଡିଓଟିକୁ Like କରନ୍ତୁ, Comment ରେ 'ଜୟ ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ' ଲେଖନ୍ତୁ ଏବଂ ଚ୍ୟାନେଲ୍‌କୁ Subscribe କରି ଆମ ସହ ଯୋଡ଼ି ହୋଇ ରୁହନ୍ତୁ

#BhariGuluguliSnanaPunei #KaliaTuKemitikaThakura #AdyaAdrika #odiabhaktichannel #SnanaPurnima2026 #JagannathBhajan #OdiaDevotional #NewOdiaBhajan

snippet.title: Loorey - RAADA BAAN
snippet.description:
Raada baan 
Loorey
Prod by R.A.M. 


Raada baan ……… chup lagera 
Bhada haan.. x 2 

Bhanna man thena , tara naam nai  yasko mach*kne
Shanta basum bhanya, tara hasdai aayo mach*kne 
Mach*kne  pagal ja NTF sanga maths sikna ? 
Sundar thakuri , ke cha khabar ? Haa ch*kne
Chichya  ghaati chyaatinjel,
i aint backing bad business
Bitches getting slapped in here
Time ma ayish, myaach*kney,
I dont have to drag you here
Afai aaissh, fya fullaa
Tero lagi khyak hu ma 
Talai bhetna byaakul thiye
M*ji, fusi ko dalla, bhatti ma garcha halla
Sauni ko udhaaro  natiri japan faraaarr
Thaal ma maal ko dalla , 
Nadekha jail parlash ,
Jalaa tero ghar baar, ama laai garo parlaa
..m*ji… ghamandi , randi hosh ta ,
Agyanta ko bandhi hosh ta 
Aija bhai mero dandi khosna , 
Bajauchu tero baja gandu jastai ghanti hosh ta 
Raka haina khanna na pako pada  hosh ta ,
Devendra ko duplicate , kasto chada hota 
Rada baan ,   bhada haan, 
Paara paan wala , paan bana japan ma 
Ja bhanja chuplagera kaan kana
Antf jastai plan bana,  soch m*ji jaam kata 
Loorey  dincha   aam sajaa
Bhann bhai aaam kata ? 
Balaju, jyatha, nuwakot,  ki cha tero naya hood
Bhetney bhaye aija bhai, bhandinchu ma kaha chu
Yadd cha m*ji , ke re f*ck manas ghale ??
Bhandai thiesh, ch*kne ani afai chiplish khale, 
Khale m*ji, nachalhai m*ji , feri rze aucha bhare

Runchey m*ji baccha,  sadhai pyar pyar pyar
Yasko thutoonoh ma thukam , bhane yaskai mukh ma ryaal ,
Nataki pataki pakhandi raka ji , 
Visa thapna paisa chaina, 
Aijo dinchu  talai sapati , 
Tara  bhan malai kaka ji, 
Nabhaye kansha mama ji 
Tero bau ko gau ko shahu ko bau ko naati paryo manas G, 
Tero dai ko dai ko dai ko dai lai, 
Rap sikauthiyo manas le
Tero bau  ko gau ko bihey ma , 
Rap hanthiyo , manas le 
Stiil  rap hancha , manas le
Cap lagai  manasick ,
facts jharcha , manas le 
Trap garcha manas le, 
Rag hancha manas le 
Fans bhancha jhaapad le 
prank hancha manas le ..
Dance jastai  jhapalish

🎤 Lyrics: Dominic Fike - Babydoll
I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighing you down

Find me on Miami concrete
Lookin' for somebody different 'cause my daddy was a pimp
My mama had her issues but I miss her anyway, oh, babydoll

Please don't call me for the wrong reasons
We both know exactly what I'm thinkin'
Weeks pass and I never grow tired
'Cause I never said never, and I barely ever lie

I'm on a road to an original place in outer space
I didn't make it up, but you can't find it on a phone, or a globe
And I can take you with me if you really wanna go, oh, babydoll
I can't move on

And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighing you down

snippet.title: The Pretty Reckless - Dark Days (Official Visualizer)
snippet.description:
The Pretty Reckless - “Dark Days”
From the new album ‘Dear God’| AVAILABLE NOW
Listen/Download the album:https://link.theprettyreckless.com/deargod
Subscribe to Fearless Records: http://found.ee/fr_youtube

Shop The Pretty Reckless Merchandise
Band Store: http://found.ee/tpr_webstore 
Label Store: https://found.ee/tpr_frmerch
 
Stay connected with The Pretty Reckless
Website: https://found.ee/tpr_website
Facebook: https://found.ee/tpr_facebook
Instagram: https://found.ee/tpr_instagram
Twitter: https://found.ee/tpr_twitter
YouTube: https://found.ee/tpr_youtube
TikTok: https://found.ee/tpr_tt

Stay connected with Fearless Records 
Website: http://www.fearlessrecords.com/    
Facebook: https://found.ee/FearlessFB  
Instagram: https://found.ee/FearlessIG  
Twitter: https://found.ee/FearlessTW  
TikTok: https://found.ee/FearlessTT 
 
--
LYRICS
Walk alone on a road last night
Met a man named Blue
He was lost in a diner light
I was lost there too
He offered me his window
He offered me his bed
I declined and held the line
And this is what he said

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
You’ll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know there’s something
I can’t put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we owe this song
Oh...

Left alone in a hotel room
The night was turning cool
So bright in a diamond light
The angels cried and crooned
They offered me their vision
Of ghosts in every wall
I declined and held the line
And watched the angels fall

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
You’ll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know there’s something
I can’t put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we Oh this song
Oh...

Wars and whores
And deadlines never met
Lores through doors
In bedtime stories read
What we were is over
And what we are is gone
When I look in your eyes
I don’t want to sing this song

Dark days are coming
So the Bible says
You’ll see them running
When the sky turns red
I know there’s something
I can’t put my finger on
Dark days are coming
So we owe this song
Oh...

#ThePrettyReckless #darkdays #deargod #taylormomsen

Mi hanno offerto la loro visione
Di fantasmi in ogni muro
Ho rifiutato e ho tenuto duro

Così dice la Bibbia
Li vedrai correre
Quando il cielo diventerà rosso
So che c'è qualcosa
Che non riesco a definire

Quindi noi Oh questa canzone
Oh...

E scadenze mai rispettate
Storie trapelate attraverso le porte
Nelle storie della buonanotte lette
Ciò che eravamo è finito
E ciò che siamo non c'è più
Quando guardo nei tuoi occhi
Non voglio cantare questa canzone

snippet.title: Salala Karnali | Pramod Kharel | Pramod & Parampara | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
A soulful tribute to the beauty of Karnali, "Salala Karnali" brings together the timeless voice of Pramod Kharel with the words and music of Suraj Thapa. Shot amid the breathtaking landscapes of Jumla, this song is a heartfelt celebration of love, land, and the spirit of the Karnali region.

🎵 SONG: Salala Karnali

Suraj Thapa

Vocal: 
Pramod Kharel

Supporting Vocal: 
Shristi Budha

Music Arrangement: 
Pramod & Parampara, Suraj Thapa

Additional Music Arrangement: 
Rahul Bhujel

Intro Lyrics: 
Bhim BC

Pramod Kharel

Chorus: 
Bikram Karki, Pratik Biswokarma, Suraj Thapa

Studio M Nepal

Recordist: 
Manjil KC

snippet.title: The Neighbourhood - Sweater Weather (Lyrics + Letra)
snippet.description:
🩸Lyrics →
All I am is a man
I want the world in my hands
I hate the beach, but I stand
In California, with my toes in the sand

Use the sleeves of my sweater
Let's have an adventure
Head in the clouds, but my gravity's centered
Touch my neck and I'll touch yours
You in those little high waisted shorts, oh

She knows what I think about
And what I think about
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that wouldn't wanna tell you about no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

And if I may just take your breath away
I don't mind if there's not much to say
Sometimes the silence guides our minds
To move to a place so far away

The goosebumps start to raise
The minute that my left hand meets your waist
And then I watch your face
Put my finger on your tongue, 'cause you love to taste, yeah

These hearts adore
Everyone the other beats hardest for
Inside, this place is warm
Outside, it starts to pour

Coming down
One love, two mouths
One love, one house
No shirt, no blouse
Just us, you find out
Nothing that I wouldn't wanna tell you about, no, no, no

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater, ooh, ooh

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
So let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

'Cause it's too cold
For you here and now
Let me hold
Both your hands in the holes of my sweater

It's too cold
It's too cold
The holes of my sweater

❤️‍🔥Tags →

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Nazwa w Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Czym jest Roblox? ROBLOX to wirtualny plac zabaw i warsztat online, gdzie dzieci w każdym wieku mogą bezpiecznie wchodzić w interakcje, tworzyć, bawić się i uczyć. Wyjątkowość ROBLOX polega na tym, że praktycznie wszystko w grze jest projektowane i konstruowane przez członków społeczności. Każdy gracz zaczyna od wyboru awatara i nadania mu tożsamości. Następnie może odkrywać ROBLOX — wchodząc w interakcje z innymi poprzez czatowanie, granie w gry lub współpracę przy kreatywnych projektach. Każdy gracz otrzymuje również własny, niezagospodarowany kawałek ziemi wraz z wirtualnym zestawem narzędzi, za pomocą którego może zaprojektować i zbudować cokolwiek zechce — czy to nawigowalny wieżowiec, działający helikopter, gigantyczny flipper, grę wieloosobową „Zdobądź Flagę” czy inne, jeszcze niewyobrażalne dzieło. Ta pierwsza wirtualna działka jest darmowa. Uczestnicząc w projekcie i budując fajne rzeczy, członkowie ROBLOX mogą zdobywać specjalne odznaki, a także dolary ROBLOX („Robuxy”). Mogą oni również przeglądać katalog online, aby kupić ubrania i akcesoria dla awatarów, a także wysokiej jakości materiały budowlane, interaktywne komponenty i działające mechanizmy.

#Roblox #foltyn

מה זה Roblox? ROBLOX הוא מגרש משחקים וירטואלי מקוון וסדנה, שבו ילדים בכל הגילאים יכולים לתקשר, ליצור, ליהנות וללמוד בבטחה. זה ייחודי בכך שכמעט כל דבר ב-ROBLOX מתוכנן ונבנה על ידי חברי הקהילה. כל שחקן מתחיל בבחירת אווטאר ומתן זהות לו. לאחר מכן הוא יכול לחקור את ROBLOX - לתקשר עם אחרים על ידי צ'אט, משחקי משחקים או שיתוף פעולה בפרויקטים יצירתיים. כל שחקן מקבל גם פיסת קרקע לא מפותחת משלו יחד עם ארגז כלים וירטואלי שבעזרתו ניתן לעצב ולבנות כל דבר - בין אם זה גורד שחקים ניווט, מסוק פעיל, מכונת פינבול ענקית, משחק מרובה משתתפים "לכידת הדגל" או יצירה אחרת שטרם הומצאה. אין עלות עבור חלקת אדמה וירטואלית ראשונה זו. על ידי השתתפות ובניית דברים מגניבים, חברי ROBLOX יכולים להרוויח תגים מיוחדים וכן דולרים של ROBLOX ("Robux"). בתורם, הם יכולים לקנות בקטלוג המקוון בגדים ואביזרים לאווטארים, כמו גם חומרי בנייה איכותיים, רכיבים אינטראקטיביים ומנגנונים פועלים.

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

എന്താണ് Roblox? എല്ലാ പ്രായത്തിലുമുള്ള കുട്ടികൾക്ക് സുരക്ഷിതമായി ഇടപഴകാനും സൃഷ്ടിക്കാനും ആസ്വദിക്കാനും പഠിക്കാനും കഴിയുന്ന ഒരു ഓൺലൈൻ വെർച്വൽ കളിസ്ഥലവും വർക്ക്‌ഷോപ്പുമാണ് ROBLOX. ROBLOX-ലെ പ്രായോഗികമായി എല്ലാം കമ്മ്യൂണിറ്റിയിലെ അംഗങ്ങൾ രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്ത് നിർമ്മിച്ചതാണ് എന്നതാണ് ഇതിന്റെ പ്രത്യേകത. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും ഒരു അവതാർ തിരഞ്ഞെടുത്ത് അതിന് ഒരു ഐഡന്റിറ്റി നൽകിക്കൊണ്ടാണ് ആരംഭിക്കുന്നത്. തുടർന്ന് അവർക്ക് ROBLOX പര്യവേക്ഷണം ചെയ്യാൻ കഴിയും - മറ്റുള്ളവരുമായി ചാറ്റ് ചെയ്തുകൊണ്ടോ, ഗെയിമുകൾ കളിച്ചോ, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ സൃഷ്ടിപരമായ പ്രോജക്റ്റുകളിൽ സഹകരിച്ചോ ഇടപഴകി. ഓരോ കളിക്കാരനും അവരുടേതായ വികസിപ്പിക്കാത്ത റിയൽ എസ്റ്റേറ്റ് കഷണം നൽകുന്നു, അതോടൊപ്പം എന്തും രൂപകൽപ്പന ചെയ്യാനും നിർമ്മിക്കാനും ഒരു വെർച്വൽ ടൂൾബോക്സും നൽകുന്നു - അത് ഒരു നാവിഗേറ്റ് ചെയ്യാവുന്ന അംബരചുംബി, പ്രവർത്തിക്കുന്ന ഹെലികോപ്റ്റർ, ഒരു ഭീമൻ പിൻബോൾ മെഷീൻ, ഒരു മൾട്ടിപ്ലെയർ "ക്യാപ്ചർ ദി ഫ്ലാഗ്" ഗെയിം അല്ലെങ്കിൽ മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും, ഇതുവരെ സ്വപ്നം കാണാത്ത സൃഷ്ടി. വെർച്വൽ ഭൂമിയുടെ ഈ ആദ്യ പ്ലോട്ടിന് യാതൊരു ചെലവുമില്ല. പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും രസകരമായ കാര്യങ്ങൾ നിർമ്മിക്കുന്നതിലൂടെയും, ROBLOX അംഗങ്ങൾക്ക് സ്പെഷ്യാലിറ്റി ബാഡ്ജുകളും ROBLOX ഡോളറുകളും ("Robux") നേടാൻ കഴിയും. അതാകട്ടെ, അവതാർ വസ്ത്രങ്ങളും അനുബന്ധ ഉപകരണങ്ങളും വാങ്ങാൻ ഓൺലൈൻ കാറ്റലോഗിൽ നിന്ന് ഷോപ്പുചെയ്യാനും പ്രീമിയം നിർമ്മാണ സാമഗ്രികൾ, സംവേദനാത്മക ഘടകങ്ങൾ, പ്രവർത്തന സംവിധാനങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വാങ്ങാനും കഴിയും.

Roblox কী? ROBLOX হলো একটি অনলাইন ভার্চুয়াল খেলার মাঠ এবং কর্মশালা, যেখানে সব বয়সের শিশুরা নিরাপদে একে অপরের সাথে যোগাযোগ করতে, কিছু তৈরি করতে, মজা করতে এবং শিখতে পারে। এর বিশেষত্ব হলো, ROBLOX-এর প্রায় সবকিছুই কমিউনিটির সদস্যদের দ্বারা ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করা হয়। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড় একটি অ্যাভাটার বেছে নিয়ে এবং সেটিকে একটি পরিচয় দিয়ে খেলা শুরু করে। এরপর তারা ROBLOX-এ ঘুরে বেড়াতে পারে — চ্যাট করে, গেম খেলে বা সৃজনশীল প্রকল্পে সহযোগিতা করে অন্যদের সাথে যোগাযোগ স্থাপন করতে পারে। প্রত্যেক খেলোয়াড়কে তাদের নিজস্ব এক টুকরো অনুন্নত জমি এবং একটি ভার্চুয়াল টুলবক্সও দেওয়া হয়, যা দিয়ে তারা যেকোনো কিছু ডিজাইন ও নির্মাণ করতে পারে — তা হতে পারে চলাচলযোগ্য একটি আকাশচুম্বী ভবন, একটি সচল হেলিকপ্টার, একটি বিশাল পিনবল মেশিন, একটি মাল্টিপ্লেয়ার “ক্যাপচার দ্য ফ্ল্যাগ” গেম বা অন্য কোনো অকল্পনীয় সৃষ্টি। এই প্রথম ভার্চুয়াল জমির প্লটটির জন্য কোনো খরচ নেই। অংশগ্রহণ করে এবং চমৎকার জিনিস তৈরি করে, ROBLOX-এর সদস্যরা বিশেষ ব্যাজ এবং ROBLOX ডলার (“Robux”) অর্জন করতে পারে। এর মাধ্যমে, তারা অনলাইন ক্যাটালগ থেকে অ্যাভাটারের পোশাক ও আনুষঙ্গিক জিনিসপত্র, সেইসাথে প্রিমিয়াম নির্মাণ সামগ্রী, ইন্টারেক্টিভ উপাদান এবং সচল যন্ত্রাংশ কিনতে পারে।

Roblox란 무엇일까요? Roblox는 모든 연령대의 아이들이 안전하게 소통하고, 만들고, 즐기고, 배울 수 있는 온라인 가상 놀이터이자 작업 공간입니다. ROBLOX는 커뮤니티 회원들이 직접 디자인하고 제작하는 거의 모든 콘텐츠를 제공하는 독특한 플랫폼입니다. 모든 플레이어는 아바타를 선택하고 자신만의 정체성을 부여하는 것으로 시작합니다. 그런 다음 ROBLOX를 탐험하며 다른 플레이어와 채팅하고, 게임을 즐기고, 창의적인 프로젝트를 공동 작업하는 등 다양한 방식으로 소통할 수 있습니다. 각 플레이어에게는 개발되지 않은 가상 토지와 가상 도구 상자가 제공되어 무엇이든 디자인하고 건설할 수 있습니다. 실제로 움직이는 고층 빌딩, 작동하는 헬리콥터, 거대한 핀볼 기계, 멀티플레이어 "깃발 뺏기" 게임, 또는 아직 상상조차 하지 못한 창작물까지 만들어낼 수 있습니다. 이 첫 번째 가상 토지는 무료로 제공됩니다. ROBLOX 회원들은 참여하고 멋진 작품을 만들면서 특별 배지와 ROBLOX 달러("Robux")를 획득할 수 있습니다. 획득한 Robux로는 온라인 카탈로그에서 아바타 의상과 액세서리, 프리미엄 건축 자재, 상호 작용 구성 요소, 작동 메커니즘 등을 구매할 수 있습니다.

#Roblox #foltyn

te.title: Roblox Keyboard Escape లో $8,592,683 ఖర్చు చేస్తున్నాను!
te.description:
ఈరోజు నేను రోబ్లాక్స్ +1 కీబోర్డ్ ఎస్కేప్ ఆడాను! ఏమి జరుగుతుందో తెలుసుకోవడానికి మొత్తం వీడియోను తప్పకుండా చూడండి.

మెర్చ్: https://foltyn.shop/

ప్రత్యేక ప్రయోజనాలను పొందడానికి ఈ ఛానెల్‌లో చేరండి:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--సోషల్ మీడియా--

డిస్కార్డ్: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

రోబ్లాక్స్ గ్రూప్: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

రోబ్లాక్స్ పేరు: TheRealFoltyn

ఇన్‌స్టా: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

ట్విట్టర్: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

రోబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? రోబ్లాక్స్ అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ఆట స్థలం మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్. ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించుకోవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. ROBLOX లో దాదాపు ప్రతిదీ కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడటమే దీని ప్రత్యేకత. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడంతో ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై కలిసి పనిచేయడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎటువంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లు (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దానికి బదులుగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో షాపింగ్ చేసి అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Franklin Saves Everyone From Giant Tsunami | Indian Bike Driving 3D
snippet.description:
Franklin Saves Everyone From Giant Tsunami | Indian Bike Driving 3D
Friends, a tsunami has hit *Indian Bike Driving 3D* today! 🌊😱

And Franklin is going to save everyone from this tsunami. There is an Iron Man suit placed on a ramp in the game; Franklin will use it to rescue the people and get them out of the city.

Will Franklin be able to save everyone?
Will he manage to reach the Iron Man suit?
And will everyone survive this dangerous tsunami?

This video is going to be a lot of fun, so make sure to watch it all the way through.

Don't forget to like and subscribe! ❤️

snippet.title: 2026 PUBG MOBILE EVEREST SHOWDOWN Finals | Day 1 | The battle for the top begins!
snippet.description:
2026 PMES PUBG MOBILE EVEREST SHOWDOWN — Day 1 ko official broadcast ma tapaiharulai swagat cha! 🔥

Ultimate showdown aba suru hudai cha! Top 16 teams haru qualifiers bata battle gardai yaha samma aipugeka chan, ra aba Everest Showdown ko championship title ra glory ko lagi fight garna ready chan.

Yo 2-day grand event ma total 10 matches khelaidine chan. Aaja Day 1 ma 5 action-packed matches hunechan, ra bholi Day 2 ma baaki 5 matches khelae pachi hami naya champion paune chau!

Nepal ko  finest teams haru PMES ko yo grand stage ma collide huda, intense action, clutch moments, ra top-tier competitive PUBG MOBILE ko experience lina tayar hunuhos.

Esports history baneko live witness garnuhos. 

💰 Prize Pool: NPR 100,000

🗺️ Map Rotation
Match 1 — Rondo
Match 2 — Miramar
Match 3 — Erangel
Match 4 — Miramar
Match 5 — Erangel

snippet.title: Who Upgraded Their Subscriber's Squad Better? $500 FC Mobile Challenge
snippet.description:
Join our discord server for huge giveaways & tournaments: 
https://discord.com/invite/rkreddy

Welcome back to the channel, RK Gang! Today, we are kicking off the highly requested Subscriber Squad Upgrade Battle! 🌍🏆

I challenged DeMysterio to see who could build the absolute best FC Mobile team using one of YOUR accounts. We both started with $450 (50,000 FC Points) and strict rules: upgrade our selected subscriber's squad as high as possible. Whoever finishes with the lower OVR has to pay for the winner’s $450 account upgrade!

Watch as I take this 124 OVR squad, spam Draft Vouchers, grind out the Signature and TOTS Badges, and break the bank to pack 120 OVR Signature Hugo Sanchez and 120 OVR Pavel Nedved! Did my strategy of maxing out badges secure the win, or did The Mysterio’s 120 Neymar Jr. pull steal the show?

🚨 HOW TO ENTER THE NEXT SUBSCRIBER SQUAD UPGRADE:
